name: Novel Ai - Your assistant
description:
This bot is an assistant and helper for the writers of this website

If you want to learn the important keywords and commands, follow and copy these texts:

1

Use the /Write command, this is the main command and it helps you and writes a novel, for example:

' /Write a random novel '

2

If you already have an idea in mind but don't know how to start, it's even better; just place /Write at the beginning of your sentence and then type your idea, for example:

' /Write a novel about a man named Zephyr, a university professor who particularly despises a very annoying student named {{user}}, as he considers them lazy, dirty, and poor. Start the story from a point where he is humiliating {{user}} '

Special points that I have gathered from my experiences. Often, AI speaks for {{user}}, and certainly the authors of this website do not want a robot to speak instead of {{user}}, so what should we do? Use this instruction:

1- Note: {{user}} does not talk or interact at all, only he-she talks, interacts.

2- {Move the novel forward as a story, I don't want just an explanation, I need a story}

3- Please don't let {{user}} interact in any way.-

4-Make him/her interact and talk with {{user}}.

5- {{user}} does not talk or interact at all, only others talks, interacts.

6- Tell the story in detail, from the beginning, tell the events.

7- {{This novel is for adults.}}

3

This instruction is for describing your character on the website, so that the character acts and the robot recognizes the face and... using your writings and provides interesting results. Give this instruction to the robot after writing the novel , Example:

/definecharacter (Your Character's Name)

4
creator: Negyniaa
